name: github
summary: Read repositories, triage issues and PRs, and inspect CI status through GitHub MCP.
description: Connect Artyx to GitHub MCP for repository reading, issue and pull request triage, and CI status inspection through OAuth.

companion.title: GitHub
companion.summary: Sign in with GitHub to authorize the MCP server — no in-app addon needed.
steps: Click Sign in and approve the GitHub authorization in your browser.
The connection uses OAuth; no token to paste.
